en.dark mode_tooltip: Camp backgrounds will match with the mode: nighttime for dark mode and daytime for light mode.
en.fullscreen scaling_tooltip: If enabled, fullscreen will display as large as possible (toggle fullscreen to update). This may include visual artifacts.
en.no sprite antialiasing_tooltip: If enabled, sprites and patrol art will no longer be antialiased ("blurry"/"smooth") when in fullscreen.
en.custom cursor_tooltip: The cursor will be replaced with a cat paw. The cursor is currently unfinished and is prone to crashing.
en.keybinds_tooltip: Enables certain keybinds to be used throughout the menus for quick navigation.
en.shaders_tooltip: This will add a shading layer onto the cat sprites.
en.gore: Allow mild gore and blood in patrol artwork
en.gore_tooltip: Mild gore and blood will be allowed in the artwork displayed alongside patrols.
en.discord_tooltip: Discord will show info about your Clan, including your Clan name
en.check_for_updates_tooltip: Automatically checks for updates on startup
en.show_changelog_tooltip: Shows the changelog of the latest release on startup
en.special_dates_tooltip: Certain changes may be made to the game on special days such as April Fools
en.random relation: Randomize relationship values when creating Clan
en.random relation_tooltip: Clan founder cats will start the game with established relationships.
en.they them default_tooltip: If this setting is on, new cats will generate with they/them pronouns regardless of gender.
en.disasters_tooltip: This may result in up to 1/3rd of your Clan dying in one moon.
en.showxp: Show exact XP and nutrition status
en.showxp_tooltip: Will turn 'experience: proficient' into 'experience: proficient (151)'; and 'nutrition: full' into 'nutrition: full (70)'.
en.random med cat: Allow medicine cats to be randomly selected on patrol
en.random med cat_tooltip: Medicine cats can be selected with the patrol buttons +1, +3,+6.
en.fading: Allow dead cats to fade away
en.fading_tooltip: After 202 moons, dead cats will be unloaded, and saved separately. No family relations will be lost.
en.save_faded_copy: Save a complete copy of faded cats information
en.save_faded_copy_tooltip: A complete copy of faded cat save info will be saved in plain-text.
en.backgrounds_tooltip: Even with this off, the camp you choose will still affect the events you encounter.
en.moons and seasons_tooltip: Displays Clan age and current Clan season on several pages.
en.deputy: Allow Wardens to automatically appoint a new Sentinel
en.deputy_tooltip: The Warrior Code rules will be taken into account when choosing a deputy.
en.12_moon_graduation_tooltip: All apprentices will graduate at 12 moons.
en.retirement: Cats will never retire due to a permanent condition
en.retirement_tooltip: When this setting is off, cats with permanent conditions will choose whether or not they want to retire
en.become_mediator: Allow Watchers and Keepers to choose to become Speakers
en.become_mediator_tooltip: Warriors and elders will have a chance to become mediators upon moonskip.
en.affair: Allow mated cats to have affairs
en.affair_tooltip: This will allow mated cats to have kits with other cats that aren't their mates.
en.unmated parentage_tooltip: This will allow unmated cats to have kits with other unmated cats.
en.same sex birth_tooltip: Allow all cats to get pregnant despite their gender and all couples to birth kittens despite same-sex status.
en.same sex adoption_tooltip: If same-sex birth is disabled, this option greatly increases the chances of same-sex couples adopting.
en.single parentage: Allow cats to have kittens with an unknown second parent
en.single parentage_tooltip: Allow cats to have kittens with an unknown second biological parent. The cat will be listed as the only biological parent.
en.romantic with former mentor: Allow romantic interactions with former mentors
en.romantic with former mentor_tooltip: Allows mentors and the cats they trained to be romantic after they become warriors.
en.first cousin mates: Allow first cousins to be mates and have romantic interactions
en.first cousin mates_tooltip: Allows cats with the same grandparents but different parents to become mates.
en.low_rank_tooltip: The Clan is fed from lowest rank to highest rank. Rank order can be found in the Help button on the top left corner of this window.
en.high_rank_tooltip: The Clan is fed from highest rank to lowest rank. Rank order can be found in the Help button on the top left corner of this window.
en.youngest_first_tooltip: The Clan is fed from youngest to oldest.
en.oldest_first_tooltip: The Clan is fed from oldest to youngest.
en.hungriest_first_tooltip: The Clan is fed from most to least hungry.
en.experience_first_tooltip: The Clan is fed from most experienced to least experienced.
en.hunter_first_tooltip: Proficient hunters are fed first, then the rest are fed according to chosen order.
en.sick_injured_first_tooltip: Any injured or sick (this includes starving and malnourished) cats are fed first to help them regain their strength, then the rest are fed according to chosen order.
en.ration_prey_tooltip: All cats except newborns will eat only half the food they need, even if more food is available. This applies to automatic timeskip feedings and to manually feeding via this window.
en.auto_feed_tooltip: Cats are automatically fed during timeskip in the order chosen via Tactics.
en.business_as_usual_tooltip: The Clan has no specific focus and won't get any bonuses.
en.hunting_tooltip: The Clan will focus on hunting: each working warrior (including deputy and leader) and each working apprentice will gather additional prey on each moonskip.
en.herb_gathering_tooltip: The Clan will focus on herb gathering: each medicine cat and medicine cat apprentice will gather additional herbs on each moonskip due to extra help from the warriors.
en.threaten_outsiders_tooltip: The relationship with cats outside of the Clan decreases due to intentionally threatening behavior from the warriors.
en.seek_outsiders_tooltip: The relationship with cats outside of the Clan increases as the warriors make efforts to sow seeds of friendship.
en.rest_and_recover_tooltip: The Clan will take more care and time in their tasks and therefore the rate of injuries, illnesses and outbreaks will be reduced.
en.sabotage_other_clans_tooltip: Your mediators and warriors work together to undermine the other Clans. Only available if you have a working mediator. Selecting this will also allow you to choose which Clans you target.
en.aid_other_clans_tooltip: Your mediators and warriors work together to help the other Clans with whatever they need. Only available if you have a working mediator. Selecting this will also allow you to choose which Clans you target.
en.raid_other_clans_tooltip: Your warriors begin crossing borders for resources. Prey and herbs will greatly increase each moonskip, but injuries and illnesses will increase and the relationship with other Clans decrease. You will be able to choose which Clans you target.
en.hoarding_tooltip: Your warriors begin stockpiling as many resources as they can get their paws on, regardless of their own safety. Prey and herbs will increase each moonskip, but injuries and illnesses will also increase.
